curation_notes: The patch modifies a single source file (cmd/tiller/tiller.go) in the tlsOptions function, changing the TLS client authentication policy from tls.VerifyClientCertIfGiven to tls.RequireAndVerifyClientCert. The other 4 files changed are documentation only. The pre-assigned class crypto-weakness (from CWE-295 Improper Certificate Validation) is correct — this is a misconfigured TLS setting. No sibling files in cmd/tiller/ contain TLS configuration logic.
